statements.impact_statement: The application loads YAML only via yaml.safe_load(); the arbitrary-code-execution path that requires full load() is never reached. Confirmed by code review of sample-app/app.py.

statements.action_statement: Upgrade requests to a current patched release in the next maintenance build; tracked in the project issue list. Interim mitigation: outbound calls restricted to a trusted internal host.

statements.impact_statement: Addressed by upgrading Jinja2 to a patched release in build 0.1.1.
